phases.name: Write performance benchmark loading test
phases.reasoning: Write the test_performance_benchmarks_load test that asserts BenchmarkSuite::load returns 5 cases with correct names, non-empty code/context, and populated must_find entries. This test will initially fail (red) because no benchmark data files exist yet.

phases.name: Create all 5 performance benchmark cases
phases.reasoning: Create all 5 benchmark directories under .forge/autoresearch/benchmarks/performance/ with code.rs, context.md, and expected.json for each case: sync-event-batching (real, from commit 06cd7fe), non-shared-connection (real, from commit 54b9a63), n-plus-one-query (synthetic), blocking-in-async (synthetic), unnecessary-cloning (synthetic). All content is fully specified in the design doc. Validate JSON files parse correctly and the loading test passes (green). Verify with both python3 json.tool validation and cargo test.
